seo.title: Trade, production, repair for surgical solutions and sterilization
seo.description: Discover our wide range of products and services for reprocessing surgical tools. Learn how we help you ensure optimal care in a medical context.

intro.title: Your partner for trade mediation of pharma products, medical and orthopedic articles and laboratory supplies
intro.content: Discover our wide range of products and services for reprocessing surgical tools. Learn how we help you ensure optimal care in a medical context. We are your partner for the reprocessing of surgical instruments and medical devices.
